programs.title: The Names & Attributes of Allah
programs.description: A study in the oneness of Allah's names and attributes, from the Qur'an and authentic Sunnah — upon the understanding of the Salaf al-Salih.

programs.title: Qur'anic Arabic
programs.description: Learn the language of the Qur'an — grammar, vocabulary, and the tools to understand Allah's Book in its original tongue.

programs.title: Bulugh al-Maram — Hadith of Rulings
programs.teacherBio: Graduate of the Islamic University of Madinah
programs.description: The classic collection of Ibn Hajar al-Asqalani — studying the ahadith of rulings with their fiqh benefits, grade, and application.

programs.title: Bulugh al-Maram — Continued
programs.teacherBio: Graduate of the Islamic University of Madinah
programs.description: The weekly continuation of Bulugh al-Maram — building a student's foundation in the fiqh of worship, transactions, and daily life.
